title: Whisked Greek Feta Crumble
description: A savory, light brunch dish featuring a gluten-free-friendly crumble of feta cheese mixed with Greek yogurt and herbs.

ingredients.name: Crumbled feta cheese
ingredients.notes: Use a high-quality, light and crumbly feta to avoid excess moisture.

ingredients.name: Garlic cloves
ingredients.notes: Mince finely for extra flavor but optional if milder taste is desired.

instructions: In a bowl, combine Greek yogurt and fresh oregano. Stir well until combined.
Fold in the crumbled feta cheese using a spatula or wooden spoon to incorporate gently without breaking up too much of it.
Add minced garlic if desired, mix thoroughly to distribute evenly throughout the mixture.
Transfer the crumble into a serving dish and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes before serving to allow flavors to meld together.
